panels.description: Total number of jobs executed per month over the last year, across all providers.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', j.created) AS time,
    COUNT(*) AS jobs
FROM api_job j
WHERE j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 year'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1 ASC;

panels.title: Total jobs per month (last year)

panels.description: Number of jobs executed per provider over the last year, aggregated by month and stacked by provider.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', j.created), 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
    p.name AS provider,
    COUNT(*) AS jobs
FROM api_provider p
JOIN api_program pg ON pg.provider_id = p.id
JOIN api_job j ON j.program_id = pg.id
    AND j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 year'
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1 ASC;

panels.title: Jobs per provider (last year)
Partners using Serverless Client to execute runtime jobs

panels.description: Percentage of SUCCEEDED jobs that generated at least one RuntimeJob, grouped by provider, comparing the last 3 weeks.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
      p.name AS provider,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
      COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND rj.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)                                                                                                                                                                                
          / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 1 END), 0), 1), 0) AS "last week",                                                                                                                                                                                        
      COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND rj.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)                                                                                                                                     
          / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 1 END), 0), 1), 0) AS "previous week",                                                                                                                                         
      COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '21 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND rj.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)                                                                                                                                    
          / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '21 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' THEN 1 END), 0), 1), 0) AS "2 weeks ago"                                                                                                                                           
  FROM api_provider p                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  JOIN api_program pg ON pg.provider_id = p.id                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
  JOIN api_job j ON j.program_id = pg.id                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
      AND j.status = 'SUCCEEDED'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
      AND j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '21 days'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
  LEFT JOIN (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
      SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM api_runtimejob                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
  ) rj ON rj.job_id = j.id                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
  GROUP BY p.name                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
  ORDER BY "last week" ASC NULLS FIRST;

panels.title: Job rate with runtime jobs

panels.description: Absolute count of SUCCEEDED jobs from the last week that have or do not have an associated RuntimeJob, per provider.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    p.name AS provider,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN rj.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS "jobs with runtime",
    COUNT(CASE WHEN rj.job_id IS NULL THEN 1 END)     AS "jobs without runtime"
FROM api_provider p
JOIN api_program pg ON pg.provider_id = p.id
JOIN api_job j ON j.program_id = pg.id
    AND j.status = 'SUCCEEDED'
    AND j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM api_runtimejob
) rj ON rj.job_id = j.id
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY "jobs with runtime" ASC;

panels.title: Jobs with/without runtime (last week)

panels.description: Percentage of SUCCEEDED jobs that emitted at least one sub_status change event, grouped by provider, comparing the last 3 weeks. A high value indicates the provider is actively using the sub_status system to report granular progress.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    p.name AS provider,
    COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND je.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 1 END), 0), 1), 0) AS "last week",
    COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND je.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 1 END), 0), 1), 0) AS "previous week",
    COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '21 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND je.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '21 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' THEN 1 END), 0), 1), 0) AS "2 weeks ago"
FROM api_provider p
JOIN api_program pg ON pg.provider_id = p.id
JOIN api_job j ON j.program_id = pg.id
    AND j.status = 'SUCCEEDED'
    AND j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '21 days'
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM api_jobevent WHERE event_type = 'SUB_STATUS_CHANGE'
) je ON je.job_id = j.id
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY "last week" ASC NULLS FIRST;

panels.title: Job rate with sub_status events

panels.description: Absolute count of SUCCEEDED jobs from the last week that have or have not emitted at least one sub_status event, per provider. Useful to identify which partners are actively using the sub_status system.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    p.name AS provider,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN je.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS "jobs with sub_status",
    COUNT(CASE WHEN je.job_id IS NULL THEN 1 END)     AS "jobs without sub_status"
FROM api_provider p
JOIN api_program pg ON pg.provider_id = p.id
JOIN api_job j ON j.program_id = pg.id
    AND j.status = 'SUCCEEDED'
    AND j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM api_jobevent WHERE event_type = 'SUB_STATUS_CHANGE'
) je ON je.job_id = j.id
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY "jobs with sub_status" ASC;

panels.title: Jobs with/without sub_status events (last week)

panels.description: Percentage of jobs that generated at least one error event, grouped by provider, comparing the last 3 weeks. A high value indicates the provider has a significant portion of jobs with errors.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    p.name AS provider,
    COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND je.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 1 END), 0), 1), 0) AS "last week",
    COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND je.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 1 END), 0), 1), 0) AS "previous week",
    COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '21 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND je.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '21 days' AND j.created < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' THEN 1 END), 0), 1), 0) AS "2 weeks ago"
FROM api_provider p
JOIN api_program pg ON pg.provider_id = p.id
JOIN api_job j ON j.program_id = pg.id
    AND j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '21 days'
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM api_jobevent WHERE event_type = 'ERROR'
) je ON je.job_id = j.id
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY "last week" DESC NULLS LAST;

panels.title: Job error rate

panels.description: Absolute count of jobs from the last week that have or have not generated at least one error event, per provider.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    p.name AS provider,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN je.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS "jobs with errors",
    COUNT(CASE WHEN je.job_id IS NULL THEN 1 END)     AS "jobs without errors"
FROM api_provider p
JOIN api_program pg ON pg.provider_id = p.id
JOIN api_job j ON j.program_id = pg.id
    AND j.created >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM api_jobevent WHERE event_type = 'ERROR'
) je ON je.job_id = j.id
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY "jobs with errors" DESC;

panels.title: Jobs with/without errors (last week)
